title: pelargonium × eriophorum
intro: Pelargonium × eriophorum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the geranium family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × eriophorum include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to help manage anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and extracts that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
